external_references.description: CERT Polska. (2026, January 30). Energy Sector Incident  Report – 29 December. Retrieved April 22, 2026.
ESET. (2026, January 30). DynoWiper update: Technical analysis and attribution. Retrieved April 22, 2026.
ESET. (2026, January 30). Russian Sandworm group attacks energy company in Poland with DynoWiper, ESET Research discovers. Retrieved April 22, 2026.

objects.description: During the [2025 Poland Wiper Attacks](https://attack.mitre.org/campaigns/C0063), the adversaries observed that their malware was initially detected by the victims EDR solutions, so they modified the payload and attempted to execute the new version within the same day.(Citation: CERT Polska)(Citation: ESET DynoWiper JAN 2026)(Citation: ESET DynoWiper Update JAN 2026)
